title: Sitting
content_markdown:
#### Indications

For the comfort of patients who are travelling on the stretcher:

- Particularly patients who are short of breath or in respiratory distress.
- Eye injuries.
- Croup and Epiglottitis.
- Vomiting (conscious patient).
- Hypertensive crisis.
- STEMI (monitor perfusion).

#### Procedure

- Have the patient lean forward if possible.

- Lift the red leaver located at the head end of the stretcher and raise the head end to the desired height (see **Figure 1**).

Figure 1

- Release the red leaver.

- Reassess patient’s respiratory and perfusion status.
